input.headline: Andy Burnham may be King of the North, but could he rule No 10?

raw.headline: Andy Burnham may be King of the North, but could he rule No 10?

winner: In Manchester, they say Andy Burnham's reign is a hit, but in London, he might struggle to get ten in the poll. After all, Andy Burnham may be King of the North, but could he rule No 10... or just Number 5?

candidates.text: Why did Andy Burnham refuse to play chess at No. 10? Because in the North, he's already the King!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'King of the North' and 'No 10' with clever wordplay and relevance to the headline."}

candidates.text: Why did Andy Burnham decline the offer for a throne at No 10? Because he was already the King of the North... and North London's traffic is bad enough as it is.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "Puns on 'King of the North' and ties in a relatable local issue (traffic), showing creativity and specificity."}

candidates.text: In Manchester, they say Andy Burnham's reign is a hit, but in London, he might struggle to get ten in the poll. After all, Andy Burnham may be King of the North, but could he rule No 10... or just Number 5?
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Smart wordplay on 'Number 10' (the UK Prime Minister's residence) and 'Number 5' (a humorous downgrade). Specific to Andy Burnham's political role and location-based humor. Brevity and surprise are well executed."}

candidates.text: In Manchester's heart, they say Andy Burnham reigns supreme, But if he dreams of ruling Number Ten, he may have to clean.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has some wordplay with 'reigns supreme' and 'clean,' but the connection between Andy Burnham ruling Number Ten and needing to clean is weak and not very surprising. It lacks specificity in referencing political context and feels a bit forced."}

candidates.text: Andy Burnham's reign in the north is quite a hit, but let's be honest, he struggles with the cold and the traffic in No 10!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and has a mild surprise element with the mention of traffic in No 10, but it's a bit generic and lacks sharper wit or deeper humor."}
